com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random

Interface LuckyCollection<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the type of items in this collection
    All Superinterfaces:
    java.util.Collection<T>, java.lang.Iterable<T>, WeightCollection<T>
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ItemsBag

    public interface LuckyCollection<T>
extends WeightCollection<T>
    Represents a collection of items that can be rolled with a certain chance. The amount of items rolled is determined by the Amount associated with this collection.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Amount getAmount()
      Gets the amount of items to roll from this collection.
      java.util.Set<T> rollItems(Player player)
      Rolls items from this collection based on the defined amount and chance.
      void setAmount(Amount amount)
      Sets the amount of items to roll from this collection.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random.WeightCollection

        add, toWeightMap

      • Methods inherited from interface java.util.Collection

        add, addAll, clear, contains, containsAll, equals, hashCode, isEmpty, iterator, parallelStream, remove, removeAll, removeIf, retainAll, size, spliterator, stream, toArray, toArray

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach

    • Method Detail

      • getAmount

        Amount getAmount()
        Gets the amount of items to roll from this collection.
        Returns:
        the amount of items to roll

      • setAmount

        void setAmount(Amount amount)
        Sets the amount of items to roll from this collection.
        Parameters:
        amount - the new amount of items to roll

      • rollItems

        java.util.Set<T> rollItems(Player player)
        Rolls items from this collection based on the defined amount and chance.
        Parameters:
        player - the player for whom the items are being rolled
        Returns:
        a set of rolled items
